_doc: WIRING REGISTER — file+line-evidenced status of every documented/built component vs what is actually live-by-default on the acceptance path (compare_constellations.py -> server /mind/arm+/train -> JointMindTarget -> JointConstellation -> qigkernels arm + coordizer + boundary). Directive: matrix 3272a6b3. Built by 5 parallel read-only audit lanes (CCAa, 2026-07-21). status in {wired, built-not-wired, doc-only, flagged-not-purged}. Consumed by scripts/run_manifest.py.
acceptance_path: qig-studio/scripts/compare_constellations.py -> POST /mind/arm (set_arm) + POST /train (_train_core) -> targets/joint_mind.py -> constellation/joint_trainer.py JointConstellation -> qigkernels arm + coordizer + Qwen boundary peer
